programme.title: The Weakest Link
programme.desc: The celebrity contestants in this episode are Kate Lawler, Les Dennis, Troy Deeney, Jordan Gray, Jeff Brazier, Aljaz Skorjanec, Ella Thomas and Roo Irvine.

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: As the team gather for an emotional funeral, they prepare to say a final farewell. Contains some scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lucy is not impressed with the old campervan Lee has borrowed for the weekend. Contains adult humour.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of five Premier League matches, including Manchester United's trip to Chelsea, with both clubs chasing a Champions League spot.

programme.title: Bernardo Silva: The Football Interview
programme.desc: Kelly Somers speaks to the Manchester City captain and Portugal midfielder Bernardo Silva.

programme.title: Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: In 2029, an astronaut crash-lands on a mysterious planet where evolved, talking apes dominate a race of primitive humans. Contains scenes of moderate violence.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Highlights of five Premier League matches, including Manchester United's trip to Chelsea, with both clubs chasing a Champions League spot.

programme.title: Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg
programme.desc: Laura Kuenssberg talks to Liz Kendall MP, Alex Burghart MP and Robert Jenrick MP. Also, a special report from Scotland, where Laura interviews all six of the main party leaders.

programme.title: Politics London
programme.desc: The latest political news, interviews and debate.

programme.title: Secrets of the Conclave
programme.desc: Featuring unseen footage and with exclusive access to the Vatican, this is the inside story of the papal conclave that elected Pope Leo XIV, told by the cardinals who were there.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A couple of challenging projects in Cambridgeshire and Lincolnshire mean the new owners will need to roll their sleeves up.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp is in Doune near Stirling with experts Danny Sebastian and Roo Irvine. Natasha learns more about the history of tartan.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: Songs of Praise: Royal Recognition of Christian Service
programme.desc: Aled Jones is at the Royal Maundy service to see the King honour deserving Christians.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman is in Devon, house-hunting with a pair of entrepreneurial sisters who dream of creating their very own glamping business.

programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Charlie and Chris are in Yateley to create a Mediterranean dream garden for sisters Julia and Angela.

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Delighting in all things wicked, supervillain Gru hatches a plot to steal the moon.

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the hidden lives of foxes, hedgehogs, blue tits and frogs, each making a life for themselves in a small urban garden in Bristol.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: John Craven and Charlotte Smith are in the Peak District National Park, famed for its breathtaking landscapes and wildlife.

programme.title: Secret Garden
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the hidden struggles of swallows, field mice, newts and moles as they race to breed in a beautiful country garden in Cumbria.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Royal Special
programme.desc: The roadshow marks the centenary of Queen Elizabeth II's birth with a special episode filmed at Windsor Castle, featuring personal items and cherished mementoes.

programme.title: Queen Elizabeth II: Her Story, Our Century
programme.desc: A century of change in Britain through the prism of Queen Elizabeth II's remarkable life.

programme.title: BBC News and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Match of the Day
programme.desc: Arsenal travel to Manchester City in a game that could be crucial in deciding this season's Premier League title race. Elsewhere, Everton face Liverpool at their new Hill Dickinson Stadium.

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Claudia is joined by actor and writer Dan Levy, actor Phil Dunster, star of stage and screen Cush Jumbo and comedian Josh Widdicombe. Contains some strong language.

programme.title: Ambulance
programme.desc: Specialist paramedic Alistair is first on scene to treat severe injuries after a 20ft fall. Contains scenes which some viewers may find upsetting.

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: Detailed weather forecast.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: BBC One joins the BBC's rolling news channel for a night of news.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The latest news, sport, business and weather from the BBC's Breakfast team.

programme.title: Morning Live
programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Expert Witness
programme.desc: The murderer of Sarah Payne is linked to the crime by a forensic pollen expert.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: We're 'flat out', with three very different flats in London, Bath and Shropshire. Can the new owners who purchased them at auction bring them up to scratch.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams of families go antiques-hunting at a huge fair in Kent, in the company of their experts Catherine Southon and JP, aka Jonathan Pratt.

programme.title: BBC News at One including BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: Shift the Thrift
programme.desc: In Bridgend, Anum and Betti race to turn charity shop finds into profit, risking big on designer items, bold upcycles and a high-stakes live-streamed auction.

programme.title: Designing the Hebrides
programme.desc: The Isle of Mull Rugby Club hire Banjo to redesign their bar. But with little knowledge of the game, how will Banjo's adventurous design go down with the club.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Ginny Buckley is in rural Worcestershire, with a tempting property line-up to fulfil the dreams of her escapees. She also meets a family who left London to start a brewery.

programme.title: I Made It at Market
programme.desc: Dom revisits stone carver Louise and stained-glass artist Charlotte to find out how they have built thriving businesses and how much they earn after leaving his business boot camp.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: Roman Kemp, with sidekick Sarah Greene, hosts the quiz show where knowledge equals speed. Simon, Charlotte, Jessica, Conor and Lizzy race in moving podiums to try to win £5,000.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Tom Allen for the quiz where contestants try to score as few points as possible by coming up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: The latest national and international news from the BBC.

programme.title: BBC London News
programme.desc: The latest news, sport and weather from London.

programme.title: Party Election Broadcast by the Green Party
programme.desc: A party election broadcast by the Green Party for the local and mayoral elections on 7 May.

programme.title: The One Show
programme.desc: Alex Jones and Roman Kemp bring you the stories that matter from across the country.

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Priya tries to help Ravi, Nugget stands up for himself, and Lauren explores a new business venture.
